title: Klimaat- en Energieverkenning 2024 (PBL)
note: The Dutch-language category A case and the heaviest compression task: 183 pages into roughly 20 slides. Reference deck is PBL's own summary presentation.
licence: PBL publication, generally CC BY -- licence page not individually verified. Local evaluation only.
expectedCharacteristics: States the 2030 emission-reduction bandwidth against 1990 and the low probability of hitting the statutory target
Keeps vastgesteld and voorgenomen beleid separate rather than blending them
Stays in Dutch and matches the formal policy register of the source
